creator: lifanov@freebsd.org
text: Sorry, I didn't see your message. I'll try to rephrase the pkg-message when I update it next. We have a Docker server port under sysutils/docker-freebsd, but it is quite old. The changes were forward-ported to 17.06.1, but the updated port doesn't work yet. It would be nice to get docker-machine working with bhyve...
